steps.title: Identify the emphasis on local sourcing
steps.content: Every example highlights local sourcing: Taylor uses Arizona plants, Arizona dock roots, and clay from nearby soil. The passage repeatedly shows her drawing materials from her immediate environment.

steps.title: Apply to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice B directly states the main idea—Taylor draws on local resources in her dyeing approach. Choice A narrows to just one color in one rug; choice C invents difficulty never mentioned; choice D adds acclaim and techniques beyond the text. That matches choice B — B is correct.
